2312120.name: The King is Dead Demo
2312120.description:
You're entangled in a royal conspiracy. A deadly game where the pieces can become friends, foes, lovers, and of course… sacrifices.

The King is Dead,
Long Live the King!

  • Choices that Matter
  • Makes Friends
  • Make Enemies
  • Make Love
  • Investigate a Murder
  • Find Evidence
  • Catch the Killer
  • Chess-Based Battle Mechanics
  • Multiple Endings

The chess game you’ll enjoy, even if you don’t enjoy chess.
2312120.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
